summary: Comprehensive testing of Guild RPG club mobile app completed. Backend: 33/33 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All UI flows tested successfully including auth, games catalog, bookings, wallet, leaderboard, and profile features.

minor.issue: JWT secret key is 25 bytes (below recommended 32 bytes for SHA256)

react_native_issues.issue: Deprecation warnings: shadow* props should use boxShadow, textShadow* props should use textShadow, props.pointerEvents deprecated

action_items: Optional: Increase JWT_SECRET length to 32+ bytes for better security
Optional: Update shadow/textShadow props to new React Native syntax
critical_code_review_comments: ✓ All backend endpoints properly validated and working
✓ Games catalog with 4 seeded games displaying correctly
✓ Booking system (create/cancel) working with proper validation
✓ Wallet system with balance, transactions, and filters functional
✓ Leaderboard with multiple sort options (sessions/gold/achievements) working
✓ Masters list displaying correctly with stats
✓ Mobile-first design with proper touch targets and spacing
✓ Dark RPG theme matching guildkhv.com aesthetic
✓ All testID attributes present for testing
✓ Error handling working correctly (duplicate bookings, auth failures, etc.)
✓ MongoDB ObjectId properly excluded from responses
seed_data_creation: Seeded data already exists: 4 games, 3 masters, 4 sample users (dragon_slayer, shadow_mage, elf_ranger, dwarf_king). Test user test_hero from iteration 1 still functional. New test user test_ui_16007 created during UI testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features fully functional. Backend API endpoints tested with pytest (33 tests). Frontend UI tested with Playwright covering all tabs and flows. Seeded users available for testing: test_hero/quest123, dragon_slayer/test123, shadow_mage/test123, elf_ranger/test123, dwarf_king/test123. App accessible at https://guild-khv-mobile.preview.emergentagent.com. Only minor deprecation warnings present, no breaking issues.
rca_of_issue: N/A - No issues found. All features working as expected.
